title: Director of Deductions
research_summary: Acme Foods is a mid-size CPG company selling snack products to Walmart, Target, and Kroger. They recently posted a Deductions Manager job opening, signaling an active backlog problem. No TPM software detected on website.
pain_angle: Growing deduction backlog with Walmart and Target, currently managing in Excel with a small team.
personalization_hook: Saw Acme Foods just expanded their snack line into Costco last month.
recent_news: Acme Foods expanded distribution to Costco in March 2026.
